item.title: Starlight Cosplay - The Boys
item.description: Might be one of my new favorite's I've put together! I have really had a blast watching this series and had to do this cosplay :D Also, my cosplay T.H.T streak continues on!

item.dc:creator: vidadobl6

item.title: Captain Carter Cosplay
item.description:
SnarkyJayCosplay here, wanted to share these shots from my Captain Carter shoot.
Went out and did these yesterday, pretty stoked about how they turned out.
Kind of a weird cosplay for me to do, I’m more into characters like Catwoman lately. But I’d always wanted to cosplay Captain America, and after seeing Hayley Atwell as Captain Carter in Doctor Strange, I figured it would work.
I wanna weather the spats for next time I wear them, but I’m stoked about the rest of the suit.
item.dc:creator: rectalpossum

item.title: The 141st vol. of "I'm not actually removing these from my phone, I just wanted to share them so that I could feel some sort of connection in this dismal world" Dump
item.description:
Teachers are underpaid
and underappreciated
Every bad thing that has happened since 5-28-2016 has been because they killed Harambe.
EDIT: For those of you pointing out Harambe wasn't a monkey: Monkeys are primates, and Monkeypox can be found in all primates. https://www.cdc.gov/poxvirus/monkeypox/about.html
Dis cord
STAY TUNED! *** I started my new job this week, so MeeMay release times may change slightly *** I'll be releasing more MeeMays back into the wild each Mon - Thu b̶e̶t̶w̶e̶e̶n̶ 1̶1̶a̶m̶ a̶n̶d̶ N̶o̶o̶n̶ E̶S̶T̶, in my ""I'm not actually removing these from my phone, I just wanted to share them so that I could feel some sort of connection in this dismal world" Dumps" Or use Imgur's "Follow" Feature, which will alert you whenever one of my dumps goes Viral.
As a Minneapolite, yes
I also want to communicate with rabbits. They always run away and I want to pet them.
I'd specifically like to talk to this rabbit
10,000 kilos of it.
Was def. high A.F.
I'm thinking it means eat your GPS.
I'll haunt the shit out of people if there's not at least one fight.
It works
*sus-eyes Alabama*
Sus
Words not shocking to read together: "Dolly Parton will star in", "in Taco Bell's", "streaming May 26 on" "on TikTok" But to read each of those bits together, WTF
PRO FACT / FUN HACK / LIFE TIP: I upvote 90% - 99% of positive or neutral comments on my posts, as well as ≈50% of negative ones. Shoutout to my fellow Dumpers: @DeafKitten @CodyBurkett @OhValleyOfPlenty @AbbiiStabbii @DigiT00l @MemeMuseumCurator @CeleryMan7 @DumpsterKoala @KirbyVictorious Archive Of Previous Dumps: https://imgur.com/a/vAfF9Wz Updated Weekly #Dump #Meme_Dump #Phone_Dump #MeeMays #AdolfHitlerSchoolForTheArts #TheWhoring20s #SaveTheBEEEEEES #BeeLM #SaveTheBees #JettfreyEpsfuelCandnt #CommeltSteelBeamicide #WhatIfNobodyShotJFK #AndHisHeadJustDidThat #EatingAppsTakingNaps #EatNamesAndTakeAss #IfYoureDeadInside #MasturbatingIsNecrophilia #AllTiddiesAreGoodTiddies #FreeTheNipple
item.dc:creator: PyroDragon
